name: Chile Pablano with Verde Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Use any low fat cheese such as Mozzarella, Monterey Jack, or cheddar.
Let the number of hot chiles depend on the heat of the chile.
1. For the Verde Sauce: Boil tomatillos for approximately 15-20 minutes. Drain and cool with cold water. Peel off the outer brown skin. In a blender, blend all ingredients until smooth. Set aside until needed.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F. Boil whole chicken with salt, pepper, oregano, and a whole bay leaf for 40 - 45 minutes until the chicken falls off the bone. Remove the skin and cool. Shred the chicken.
3. Blanch chiles in boiling water. Peel off the outside skin and let cool. Slice the chiles open lengthwise.
4. Stuff each chile with about 3-4 ounces of shredded chicken and 2 ounces of cheese.
5. Lay the stuffed chiles in a 9" X 13" baking dish. Cover with Verde Sauce. Sprinkle with grated cheese.
6. Heat in the oven for 20 minutes. Serve with rice and beans if desired.
